metadata.name: Escalate — Blessed Alliance modes 0 and 0+1
metadata.description: Tests the Escalate keyword (CR 702.120) using Blessed Alliance. Scenario 1: cast with no escalate payment — only mode 0 fires (target player gains 4 life), costing {1}{W}. Scenario 2: cast with escalate_modes=1 — modes 0 and 1 both fire (target player gains 4 life, then two creatures are untapped), costing {1}{W} plus the escalate cost {2} = {3}{W} total. p2 has two tapped Llanowar Elves that serve as untap targets for mode 1. All four declared targets are provided in both casts as required by the card definition's shared target list.
metadata.generation_notes: Blessed Alliance has Escalate {2} and a ModeSelection with 3 modes. The card definition declares 4 shared targets up front (indices 0-3). Scenario 1 uses cast_spell (escalate_modes=0 implicitly) — base cost {1}{W} only, mode 0 executes: p1 gains 4 life (40→44). Scenario 2 uses cast_spell_escalate with escalate_modes=1 — additional cost {2} for one extra mode, total {3}{W}, modes 0 and 1 execute: p1 gains 4 life (44→48) and both Llanowar Elves on p2 battlefield are untapped. p2's creatures start tapped; after scenario 2 resolution they are untapped. Four targets are always provided: index 0=p1 (gains life), index 1=Llanowar Elves creature 1, index 2=Llanowar Elves creature 2, index 3=p2 (mode 2 opponent, not executed in either scenario).

script.step_note: Scenario 1: cast Blessed Alliance with no escalate (mode 0 only) — target p1 gains 4 life

actions.description: Initial: p1 at 40 life, 2x Blessed Alliance in hand, both Llanowar Elves tapped on p2 battlefield

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Blessed Alliance for {1}{W} (no escalate). Mode 0 selected: target p1 gains 4 life. All 4 shared targets declared per card definition.

actions.description: After casting: Blessed Alliance on stack, one copy remains in p1 hand

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 118.2: Mode 0 executes — p1 gains 4 life (40 → 44). No escalate paid so only mode 0 fires.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Blessed Alliance resolves. escalate_modes=0 so only mode 0 executes.

actions.description: After scenario 1 resolution: p1 at 44 life, stack empty, Blessed Alliance in p1 graveyard
actions.note: p1 gained 4 life from mode 0. No escalate was paid so mode 1 (untap) did not fire.

script.step_note: Scenario 2: cast Blessed Alliance with escalate_modes=1 (modes 0 and 1) — p1 gains 4 life and both Llanowar Elves are untapped

actions.note: CR 702.120: p1 casts Blessed Alliance paying escalate cost {2} once for escalate_modes=1. Total cost {1}{W}+{2}={3}{W}. Modes 0 and 1 will execute at resolution.

actions.description: After casting with escalate: Blessed Alliance on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 702.120: Escalate cost was paid; spell is on the stack with modes 0 and 1 selected.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 118.2: Mode 0 executes — p1 gains 4 life (44 → 48).
CR 702.120: Mode 1 executes (escalate was paid) — both Llanowar Elves are untapped.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Blessed Alliance resolves with escalate_modes=1; modes 0 and 1 execute.

actions.description: After scenario 2 resolution: p1 at 48 life, both Llanowar Elves untapped, stack empty
actions.note: p1 gained 4 more life from mode 0 (44→48). Mode 1 untapped both Llanowar Elves on p2 battlefield.
